author: y4rr
content: Result: Delivered Sprint V.2 SwinTransformer forward parity (#933). Added 5 fixture-backed conformance tests (swin_tiny_v2_output_shape_fixture, swin_tiny_v2_param_count_fixture, swin_tiny_v2_output_finite_fixture, swin_tiny_v2_custom_classes_fixture, swin_tiny_v2_determinism_fixture) to conformance_vision_models.rs. Extended scripts/regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py with V.2 Swin section. Updated fixtures_v_parity.json. All 115 conformance_vision_models tests pass. Workspace build and clippy clean. No source changes to swin.rs needed.
